title: MinerU 3.4.4 pipeline options
description: Options verified against the mineru-3.4.4-released CLI and pipeline configuration sources. Runner-managed and unavailable choices remain visible for inspection.

inputPath.title: Input path
inputPath.description: The CLI requires --path. Document Arena supplies the uploaded stage source inside the isolated container.

availability.reason: Managed by the runner from the stage source artifact.

outputDirectory.title: Output directory
outputDirectory.description: The CLI requires --output. Document Arena uses a fresh ephemeral workspace and then imports validated artifacts.

availability.reason: Managed by the isolated runner workspace.

apiUrl.title: MinerU API URL
apiUrl.description: Routes CLI orchestration through a MinerU FastAPI service instead of this component's direct isolated process.

availability.reason: The CLI's runner-managed temporary loopback API is used; connecting to an external MinerU API would require a different networked profile.

method.title: Parsing method
method.description: Choose automatic detection, embedded-text extraction, or OCR for image-based PDFs.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: MinerU publishes five CLI backends. This independently pinned image contains only the pipeline dependency and models.

x-document-arena.disabledReason: The VLM runtime and model are not installed in this pipeline image.
The hybrid runtime and models are not installed in this pipeline image.
Runtime networking and a compatible remote server are not configured.
Runtime networking and a compatible remote server are not configured.

availability.reason: Locked to the dependency and local models baked into this component image.

effort.title: Hybrid effort
effort.description: Controls the speed and image-analysis tradeoff for hybrid backends.

availability.reason: Hybrid effort does not apply to the fixed pipeline backend.

lang.title: OCR language model
lang.description: Pipeline OCR language. MinerU defaults to ch, which covers Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Latin.

oneOf.title: Chinese + English + Japanese + Traditional Chinese + Latin
Server Chinese + English + Japanese + Traditional Chinese + Latin

serverUrl.title: VLM or hybrid server URL
serverUrl.description: The --url endpoint used by vlm-http-client and hybrid-http-client.

availability.reason: HTTP client backends and runtime network access are not enabled for this component.
The current normalizer does not yet preserve original page-number provenance after page slicing.

endPage.title: End page index
endPage.description: Zero-based final page passed through --end. Empty means the document end.

availability.reason: The current normalizer does not yet preserve original page-number provenance after page slicing.

table.title: Table parsing
table.description: Enable table detection and structure recognition.

imageAnalysis.title: Image and chart analysis
imageAnalysis.description: VLM and hybrid backends can describe images and charts; hybrid medium effort disables it automatically.

availability.reason: Image analysis is not supported by the fixed pipeline backend.

clientSideOutputGeneration.title: Client-side output generation
clientSideOutputGeneration.description: Generate Markdown and content lists locally from artifacts returned by an HTTP backend.

availability.reason: Locally regenerated Markdown and content lists have not yet passed this component's raw-artifact and evidence-equivalence review.

device.title: Execution device
device.description: MinerU reads MINERU_DEVICE_MODE for pipeline model placement.

availability.reason: This component is the reproducible CPU pipeline profile.

modelSource.title: Model source
modelSource.description: Models are baked into the image and selected through MINERU_MODEL_SOURCE and MINERU_TOOLS_CONFIG_JSON.

availability.reason: Runtime downloads are disabled; the image uses its baked model bundle.

modelRevision.title: Pipeline model revision
modelRevision.description: Exact Hugging Face snapshot containing the layout, OCR, formula, and table model artifacts baked into this image.

availability.reason: Pinned at image build time so every run records the exact model snapshot.

chineseFormula.title: Chinese formula model
chineseFormula.description: Use pp_formulanet_plus_m instead of unimernet_small via MINERU_FORMULA_CH_SUPPORT.

mergeCrossPageTables.title: Merge cross-page tables
mergeCrossPageTables.description: Merge table fragments that continue on the next page.

pdfRenderTimeoutSeconds.title: PDF render timeout
pdfRenderTimeoutSeconds.description: Positive per-render timeout in seconds from MINERU_PDF_RENDER_TIMEOUT.

processingWindowSize.title: Processing window size
processingWindowSize.description: Positive sliding-window size. Smaller values reduce long-document peak memory; larger values can improve throughput.

intraOpThreads.title: Intra-op threads
intraOpThreads.description: ONNX Runtime intra-op threads. -1 lets the runtime choose automatically; zero is invalid.

interOpThreads.title: Inter-op threads
interOpThreads.description: ONNX Runtime inter-op threads. -1 lets the runtime choose automatically; zero is invalid.
